'''havada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swaggie|swaggie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swaggie|swaggie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| havada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævædæth|hævædæth]] || [[word:hævædæj|hævædæj]] || [[word:hævædæsh|hævædæsh]] || [[word:hævædæ|hævædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:havavadath|havavadath]] || [[word:havavadaj|havavadaj]] || [[word:havavadash|havavadash]] || [[word:havavada|havavada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:havadath|havadath]] || [[word:havadaj|havadaj]] || [[word:havadash|havadash]] || [[word:havada|havada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:havafdath|havafdath]] || [[word:havafdaj|havafdaj]] || [[word:havafdash|havafdash]] || [[word:havafdaf|havafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havadatha|havadatha]] || [[word:havadaja|havadaja]] || [[word:havadasha|havadasha]] || [[word:havadaka|havadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havadath|havadath]] || [[word:havadaj|havadaj]] || [[word:havadash|havadash]] || [[word:havada|havada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havadathal|havadathal]] || [[word:havadajal|havadajal]] || [[word:havadashal|havadashal]] || [[word:havadakal|havadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havadathatha|havadathatha]] || [[word:havadajaja|havadajaja]] || [[word:havadashasha|havadashasha]] || [[word:havadaka|havadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havadathan|havadathan]] || [[word:havadajan|havadajan]] || [[word:havadashan|havadashan]] || [[word:havadakan|havadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havadathaoro|havadathaoro]] || [[word:havadajaoro|havadajaoro]] || [[word:havadashaoro|havadashaoro]] || [[word:havadakaoro|havadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
